name: Password Protected ZIP File Opened
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Password Protected ZIP File Opened
SIGMA Description: Detects the extraction of password protected ZIP archives. See the filename variable for more details on which file has been opened.

False positives:
- Legitimate used of encrypted ZIP files

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5379 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\temporary internet files\content.outlook%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Protected ZIP File Opened on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5379 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\temporary internet files\content.outlook%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Password Protected ZIP File Opened
